  "findings": [
    "Sagging flexible duct exceeding 1/2 inch per foot between supports"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-support the flexible ductwork to limit sag to a maximum of 1/2 inch per foot per SMACNA and IMC standards",
    "Verify support spacing does not exceed 4 feet"
  ],
  "rationale": "The flexible duct installation is currently in the rough-complete stage but fails inspection due to excessive sagging (>1/2 inch per foot), which violates IMC 603 and SMACNA standards. This restriction increases static pressure and reduces airflow. The work is rated at 70% complete until this defect is corrected.",

    "IMC Section 603",
    "SMACNA Fibrous Glass Duct Construction Standards",
    "ACCA Manual D"
  ]
